data.title: Gimme Seaweed appoints Chris Lansing as CEO, former Health-Ade CEO bringing expertise to accelerate growth.
data.description: A previous CEO of Health-Ade is joining Gimme to enhance growth with leadership and successful exit strategies. Gimme Seaweed, renowned for its nutritious seaweed snacks and delicious taste, is set for rapid development under the new leadership. The announcement was made in San Francisco on Feb. 19, 2026.

data.title: Aragon Research's 2026 DXA Globe emphasizes AI assistants in optimizing customer journeys. Feb. 19, 2026, PALO ALTO - PRNewswire.
data.description: The latest Aragon Research Globe™ for Digital Experience Analytics reveals the increasing prominence of AI-driven assistants in enhancing customer journeys. Released on Feb. 19, 2026, in PALO ALTO, Calif., by Aragon Research, Inc., this second edition emphasizes the shift towards AI-powered interfaces for optimization.

data.title: Prisma Health & Atlas Healthcare form joint venture to expand outpatient surgical care in Southeast, starting with South Carolina.
data.description: A partnership between Prisma Health and Atlas Healthcare Partners has been established to enhance access to top-tier, cost-effective outpatient surgical services in South Carolina. This collaboration aims to grow a network of ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) throughout the state, ensuring improved healthcare options for residents. The initiative, announced on February 19, 2026 in Greenville, involves a significant investment in expanding ASCs to provide quality care at affordable rates.

data.title: Synaptics (NASDAQ: SYNA) will participate in investor conferences on Feb 26 and Mar 3, 2026 in San Jose.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in San Jose, California, Synaptics Incorporated made an announcement that they will be participating in upcoming investor conferences. The company is listed on Nasdaq as SYNA.

data.title: Haircare brand Matrix names global girl group KATSEYE new ambassadors, celebrating movement, inclusivity, and "Matrix Joy."
data.description: Matrix, a professional haircare brand, has announced KATSEYE, a global girl group, as its new Global Brand Ambassadors in an effort to celebrate movement, inclusivity, and "Matrix Joy." This partnership marks a significant milestone in Matrix's 40-year history.

data.title: In Buffalo, NY, Personal Injury Attorneys Ross Cellino and Timothy Cellino share key steps for post-injury care.
data.description: In Buffalo, New York on February 19, 2026, a recent HelloNation article highlighted crucial steps that individuals should take following a personal injury to safeguard their well-being and legal interests. This piece offers comprehensive advice on the necessary measures accident victims should promptly undertake to aid in their recuperation.

data.title: Keysight released Infiniium XR8 Oscilloscopes in Santa Rosa, CA, for high-speed digital validation. Reduces time from days to hours.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, a new architecture has been introduced that promises quicker analysis, clearer insights, and a more compact design. This innovation aims to reduce the time needed for digital validation from days to hours.

data.title: Dataiku ranked #33 on G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Best Analytics Software, reaching over 100 million buyers.
data.description: In New York, Dataiku, a prominent AI platform utilized by top global organizations, revealed its inclusion in G2's 2026 Best Software Awards. Dataiku secured the 33rd position on the Best Analytics Software Products list. G2, the largest software marketplace globally, engages with more than 100 million buyers each year. The Best Software Awards by G2 acknowledge the leading software companies and products worldwide, relying on genuine reviews from actual users for evaluation.

data.title: Thomas Harker named President of BZI®; new leadership roles and updated branding announced for affiliates.
data.description: Thomas Harker has been appointed as the President of BZI®, a company based in Kanarraville, Utah. This announcement also includes the introduction of new leadership positions within the company and its affiliates. Additionally, there has been a rebranding of two of its affiliate operations. This move signifies a significant shift in the organizational structure and strategic direction of BZI®.

data.title: Gradient AI launches ClaimVector: AI-powered workers’ compensation claims benchmarking for brokers. Uses real claims data.
data.description: In Boston, Gradient AI offers the ClaimVector benchmarking solution, which is based on actual claims data. This tool allows for reliable decision-making driven by data.

data.title: US trade deficit near record high in 2025, despite reduced imports from China. Commerce Dept report expected to confirm.
data.description: On Thursday, the Commerce Department is set to release a report revealing that the U.S. goods trade deficit in 2025 is expected to remain at record levels. This is despite a substantial decline in imports from China. The deficit numbers are anticipated to be significant, underscoring ongoing challenges in the trade sector despite reduced Chinese imports.

data.title: Trua Senior Living Locators franchise launches in Wichita, Kansas on Feb 19, 2026. New owner Paul joins to help seniors.
data.description: WICHITA, Kan. - On February 19, 2026, Trua, a franchise focusing on assisting families in locating suitable senior living arrangements, established its presence in Wichita, Kansas. The brand introduced Paul as the new franchise owner to oversee operations. Trua aims to aid seniors in finding compassionate care, a significant need as the elderly population continues to rise. This initiative is expected to benefit numerous families in Wichita, where the demand for senior living options is high.

data.title: Icy Hot® partners with Unrivaled to open new basketball court in Miami at Belafonte Tacolcy Center. Collier and Martin host clinic for local youth.
data.description: Two renowned basketball players, Napheesa Collier and Kate Martin, participated in a dedication event and conducted a skills clinic for local youth in Miami. The event took place on February 19, 2026. Icy Hot®, a leading pain relief brand under Opella, partnered with the women's basketball league Unrivaled for this initiative. The collaboration aimed to introduce two recently acquired talents.

data.title: Dow Jones drops post surprise jobless claims, DoorDash stock rises; Carvana stock plunges on earnings.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a decline with the Dow Jones index falling following an unexpected increase in weekly jobless claims. Carvana stock also took a hit after disappointing earnings. The Dow slipped amidst these developments. Meanwhile, DoorDash saw a rise in its stock value. The unexpected jobless claims played a significant role in the market movement. It is important for investors to monitor these fluctuations carefully.

data.title: Nayya makes Forbes Fintech 50 list for 2026, recognized as one of the most innovative private fintech companies in the US.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Nayya, an AI-driven benefits and financial decision platform, revealed its selection in the Forbes Fintech 50 2026. Forbes recognizes this list as a compilation of the leading private fintech firms in the U.S. This achievement serves as Nayya's debut on the prestigious list.

data.title: Wireless Zone climbs to No. 87 in Entrepreneur's Franchise 500, nation's top Verizon franchisor in 9th consecutive year.
data.description: In Fisher, Indiana, on February 19, 2026, Wireless Zone®, the biggest Verizon franchisor in the nation, has achieved a rank of No. 87 in the latest Entrepreneur's Franchise 500® list. This marks the company's ninth consecutive year on this influential industry ranking. This achievement highlights their continued success and growth in the industry.

data.title: Global frozen foods market to reach US$450.3 billion by 2033, growing at CAGR of 5.4% from US$311.6 billion in 2026.
data.description: In London on February 19, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide frozen foods industry is experiencing consistent growth, estimated to be worth approximately US$311.6 billion in 2026. It is anticipated to increase to US$450.3 billion by 2033, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.4% during the forecasted period. The escalating demand from consumers is a key factor propelling this expansion.
